description: Blue Sky Plan is open with a patient CBCT scan loaded (mandible_case.bsp). The panoramic curve is already set. Create a manufacturing-ready 3D model of the mandible by generating a clean 3D surface from the bone density and converting it into a solid model with a base. Emboss the text 'CASE-992' onto the model so it is clearly visible. Export the final model as an STL file to C:\Users\Docker\Documents\printable_mandible.stl.
